hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【AI】新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境；【FINANCE】摩根大通宣布500亿美元回购 高盛在美联储压力测试后提高股息；【FINANCE】美联储称美国银行可承受资本规则改革期间7080亿美元的损失。

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将高效算法与专用硬件相结合，使用最少的内存和功耗快速生成用于导航的 3D 地图。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase unveils $50 billion buyback, Goldman Sachs raises dividend after Fed stress test
items.summary: The announcements followed the release of the Federal Reserve's annual stress test, which found that all 32 large banks weathered a hypothetical recession.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通宣布500亿美元回购 高盛在美联储压力测试后提高股息
items.summary_zh: 这些公告是在美联储发布年度压力测试之后发布的，该测试发现所有 32 家大型银行都经受住了假设的衰退。

items.title: Federal Reserve says U.S. banks can withstand $708 billion in losses amid overhaul of capital rules
items.summary: The Fed's annual exercise comes at a pivotal moment for bank regulation because, unlike previous years, the results will not affect capital requirements.
items.title_zh: 美联储称美国银行可承受资本规则改革期间7080亿美元的损失
items.summary_zh: 美联储的年度演习正值银行监管的关键时刻，因为与往年不同，此次演习的结果不会影响资本要求。

items.title: Myanmar’s Civil War Has Become an Apocalypse
items.summary: Overshadowed by conflicts in Ukraine, Gaza and Lebanon, the fighting in Myanmar’s isolated heartland has reached new depths.
items.title_zh: 缅甸内战已成为一场灾难
items.summary_zh: 在乌克兰、加沙和黎巴嫩冲突的笼罩下，缅甸孤立的中心地带的战斗达到了新的深度。

items.title: Rubio Seeks to Reassure Gulf Arab Partners on Iran Deal
items.summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio was traveling among the United Arab Emirates, Kuwait and Bahrain, which were attacked by Iran during the war.
items.title_zh: 卢比奥寻求就伊朗协议安抚海湾阿拉伯伙伴
items.summary_zh: 国务卿马可·卢比奥正在阿拉伯联合酋长国、科威特和巴林之间访问，这些国家在战争期间遭到伊朗袭击。

items.title: Prediction market polls find US voters prefer federal rules over state patchwork
items.summary: The CFTC has been locked in a tug-of-war with states over who has the ultimate authority over event contracts.
items.title_zh: 预测市场民意调查发现，美国选民更喜欢联邦规则而不是各州拼凑的规则
items.summary_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 与各州就谁拥有活动合同的最终权力展开了一场拉锯战。

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin, ether lead $1 billion liquidation losses as AI trade keeps going
items.summary: A liquidation flush took bitcoin to its lowest since early June before Micron's blowout earnings and SK Hynix's U.S. listing plans steadied the AI trade that crypto had been sliding alongside.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：人工智能交易持续进行，比特币、以太币导致清算损失 10 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 在美光科技的井喷盈利和 SK 海力士的美国上市计划稳定了加密货币一直下滑的人工智能交易之前，清算潮将比特币推至 6 月初以来的最低水平。

items.title: Bitcoin has a new line in the sand. Thursday’s core PCE could stress test it.
items.summary: The market has found a new support level and it could be tested following Thursday's U.S. inflation data.
items.title_zh: 比特币已经划出了一条新线。周四的核心PCE可能会对其进行压力测试。
items.summary_zh: 市场已经找到了新的支撑位，周四美国通胀数据可能会对该支撑位进行测试。

items.title: Ripple launches RLUSD stablecoin in Japan after regulatory approval
items.summary: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin is available through SBI VC Trade for both institutional and retail users in the country.
items.title_zh: Ripple 获得监管机构批准后在日本推出 RLUSD 稳定币
items.summary_zh: Ripple 的 RLUSD 稳定币可通过 SBI VC Trade 供该国的机构和零售用户使用。

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
items.title_zh: GPT-5 如何帮助免疫学家 Derya Unutmaz 解开 3 年前的谜团
items.summary_zh: GPT-5 Pro 帮助解决了一个长达 3 年的免疫学谜团，提供了对 T 细胞行为的见解。这一突破可以支持癌症和自身免疫研究。

items.title: MIT’s Initiative for New Manufacturing builds momentum
items.summary: In its first year, INM has worked across research, workforce development, and industry engagement to help accelerate new manufacturing technologies and their real-world deployment.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新制造倡议蓄势待发
items.summary_zh: 在成立的第一年，INM 致力于研究、劳动力发展和行业参与，以帮助加速新制造技术及其实际部署。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: Trump asks Congress for $87bn, mostly for 'urgent' Iran war costs
items.summary: But the budget faces an uphill battle, coming a day after lawmakers rebuked Trump's military action.
items.title_zh: 特朗普向国会请求 870 亿美元，主要用于“紧急”的伊朗战争费用
items.summary_zh: 但在立法者谴责特朗普的军事行动的第二天，预算面临着一场艰苦的战斗。

items.title: Philippines bans video game played by alleged high school shooter
items.summary: The rare school shooting that left three students killed and 20 others injured has shocked the country.
items.title_zh: 菲律宾禁止涉嫌高中射手玩的电子游戏
items.summary_zh: 罕见的校园枪击事件导致3名学生死亡、20人受伤，震惊全国。

items.title: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
items.summary: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.
items.title_zh: 联合国核负责人表示，作为战争协议的一部分，视察员将访问伊朗场地
items.summary_zh: 拉斐尔·格罗西表示，国际原子能机构正在“研究具体方式”，但伊朗部长表示，这种准入只是与美国达成的最终协议的一部分。

items.title: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
items.summary: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.
items.title_zh: 马姆达尼支持的候选人在纽约民主党初选中大获全胜
items.summary_zh: 布拉德·兰德 (Brad Lander) 在一场竞选中击败丹·戈德曼 (Dan Goldman)，暴露了该市在以色列-加沙战争问题上的分歧。

items.title: Biggest city in Crimea without power after Ukraine strikes
items.summary: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰空袭后克里米亚最大城市断电
items.summary_zh: 塞瓦斯托波尔在莫斯科任命的州长警告说，一些地区直到晚上才会停电。

items.title: Israel Says It Has Trapped Hezbollah Fighters Underground in Southern Lebanon
items.summary: The Israeli military says thousands of troops have surrounded a large tunnel network in southern Lebanon. The standoff is at the center of intense clashes in the area recently.
items.title_zh: 以色列称已将真主党战士困在黎巴嫩南部地下
items.summary_zh: 以色列军方表示，数千名士兵包围了黎巴嫩南部的一个大型隧道网络。这场对峙是该地区最近激烈冲突的中心。

items.title: Cuba Announces Sweeping Overhaul of Struggling Communist Economy, But Obstacles Remain
items.summary: The Cuban government announced a major economic restructuring, but experts say most changes would depend on buy-in from the Trump administration.
items.title_zh: 古巴宣布对陷入困境的共产主义经济进行彻底改革，但障碍仍然存在
items.summary_zh: 古巴政府宣布进行重大经济重组，但专家表示，大多数变化将取决于特朗普政府的支持。

items.title: Bahrain Restricts Shiite Holy Day Amid Iran War Crackdown
items.summary: The restrictions are the latest in a string of measures Bahrain has taken against Shiite citizens in the Gulf country, with many accused of having loyalties to Iran.
items.title_zh: 巴林在伊朗战争镇压中限制什叶派圣日
items.summary_zh: 这些限制是巴林针对海湾国家什叶派公民采取的一系列措施中的最新一项，其中许多人被指控忠于伊朗。

items.title: MemeCore's M token suddenly crashes 80% with no clear trigger
items.summary: The token fell from nearly $3 to about $0.50 in hours, wiping out close to $3 billion in market value, with no exploit or announcement to explain it. Onchain investigator ZachXBT warned in April that M's price had been propped up by insiders.
items.title_zh: MemeCore 的 M 代币在没有明确触发的情况下突然暴跌 80%
items.summary_zh: 该代币在数小时内从近 3 美元跌至约 0.50 美元，蒸发了近 30 亿美元的市值，且没有任何漏洞或公告对此进行解释。链上调查员 ZachXBT 在 4 月份警告称，M 的价格受到了内部人士的支撑。

items.title: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin goes live in Japan after regulatory approval
items.summary: Japan's financial regulator cleared the U.S. dollar-backed token as a new category of payment instrument, letting SBI VC Trade offer it to institutions and retail. RLUSD remains small, at about $1.7 billion.
items.title_zh: Ripple 的 RLUSD 稳定币在监管部门批准后在日本上线
items.summary_zh: 日本金融监管机构批准美元支持的代币作为一种新的支付工具，允许 SBI VC Trade 将其提供给机构和零售业。 RLUSD 仍然很小，约为 17 亿美元。

items.title: Upheaval at the Ethereum Foundation has some of crypto’s biggest names feeling bullish
items.summary: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're looking at Ethereum's eventful week that started off with the launch of EthLabs, plus the layoffs at the Ethereum Foundation, and what this all means for the network.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会的剧变让一些加密货币大佬感到乐观
items.summary_zh: 在本周的《协议通讯》中，我们将关注以 EthLabs 的推出为起点的以太坊这一重要的一周，以及以太坊基金会的裁员，以及这一切对网络意味着什么。

items.title: Who gets a direct line to the Fed? Congress weighs risks of Fed ‘skinny accounts’ for crypto and fintech firms
items.summary: As the Fed considers granting firms access to "skinny" accounts, lawmakers debated how much access those companies should have.
items.title_zh: 谁可以直接联系美联储？国会权衡美联储对加密货币和金融科技公司“精简账户”的风险
items.summary_zh: 当美联储考虑授予企业访问“瘦身”账户的权限时，立法者们就这些公司应该拥有多少访问权限展开了争论。

items.title: Binance co-CEO remains ‘committed’ to securing EU license after exchange withdraws Greece bid
items.summary: The world's largest crypto exchange only has one week to secure a license in legally operate in the European Union.
items.title_zh: 在交易所撤回希腊竞标后，币安联席首席执行官仍“致力于”获得欧盟许可
items.summary_zh: 全球最大的加密货币交易所只有一周的时间来获得在欧盟合法运营的许可证。

items.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
items.summary: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.
items.title_zh: Omio 如何打造对话式旅行的未来
items.summary_zh: 了解 Omio 如何使用 OpenAI 来增强对话式旅行体验、加速产品开发并转型为一家 AI 原生公司。

items.title: A better way to model the behavior of metal alloys
items.summary: MIT researchers’ approach captures subtle atomic patterns, improving predictions of material properties.
items.title_zh: 模拟金属合金行为的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院研究人员的方法捕捉微妙的原子模式，改善对材料特性的预测。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: Anthropic accuses Chinese rival Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities
items.summary: The firm alleged that Alibaba used fraudulent accounts to access data from its Claude AI model.
items.title_zh: Anthropic 指责中国竞争对手阿里巴巴非法提取人工智能能力
items.summary_zh: 该公司声称阿里巴巴使用欺诈账户来访问其 Claude AI 模型的数据。

items.title: Independent MPs launch new Australian centrist party
items.summary: Zali Steggall and Allegra Spender say Community Strong Australia will offer citizens 'reason over rage'.
items.title_zh: 独立议员成立新的澳大利亚中间派政党
items.summary_zh: 扎利·斯蒂格尔（Zali Steggall）和阿莱格拉·斯彭德（Allegra Spender）表示，“社区强大澳大利亚”将为公民提供“理性战胜愤怒”的机会。

items.title: Bitcoin back above $60,000, ETH, SOL recoup losses as AI stocks stage rebound
items.summary: The token fell to about $59,000 before buyers stepped in, but the week's losses are steep across the board. A blowout Micron forecast lifted stocks and oil kept sliding, yet crypto did not follow.
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能股票阶段性反弹，比特币重回 60,000 美元上方，ETH、SOL 收复损失
items.summary_zh: 在买家介入之前，该代币价格跌至约 59,000 美元，但本周整体跌幅巨大。美光科技的井喷预测提振了股市，油价持续下滑，但加密货币却没有跟随。

items.title: Bitcoin falls below $60,000 as AI trade continues to draw investor interest and capital
items.summary: South Korean memory chip giant on Wednesday filed to raise nearly $30 billion in a U.S. offering.
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能交易继续吸引投资者的兴趣和资本，比特币跌破 60,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 韩国存储芯片巨头周三申请在美国发行募集近 300 亿美元资金。

items.title: Bitcoin miners face deepening margin squeeze as revenue falls below production costs
items.summary: An estimated 20% of miners are now unprofitable at current prices, and the stress shows up at the network level, too.
items.title_zh: 由于收入低于生产成本，比特币矿商面临着日益严重的利润挤压
items.summary_zh: 按当前价格计算，估计有 20% 的矿工无利可图，而且压力也体现在网络层面。

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.
items.title_zh: 新的使用情况分析和更新的企业支出控制
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 为 ChatGPT Enterprise 引入了新的支出控制和使用分析，帮助组织充满信心地管理成本并扩展 AI。

items.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
items.title_zh: 使用 NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 加速 Transformer 微调

items.title: We got local models to triage the OpenClaw repo for FREE!*
items.title_zh: 我们有本地模型免费对 OpenClaw 存储库进行分类！*

items.title_zh: MosaicLeaks：你的研究代理人能保守秘密吗？

items.title_zh: 是否足够代理？在您自己的工具上对开放模型进行基准测试

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Exploring the societal impacts of AI
items.summary: During the AI and Society Forum, leading MIT researchers examined critical questions about AI’s influence on employment and democracy.
items.title_zh: 探索人工智能的社会影响
items.summary_zh: 在人工智能与社会论坛期间，麻省理工学院的主要研究人员研究了有关人工智能对就业和民主影响的关键问题。

items.title: In game theory, generalists sometimes win out over specialists
items.summary: Researchers show that for certain kinds of games, an overlooked class of algorithms performs much better than expected.
items.title_zh: 在博弈论中，通才有时会战胜专家
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表明，对于某些类型的游戏，一类被忽视的算法的表现比预期要好得多。

items.title: Investors still seek a human touch even with AI tools at hand: HSBC
items.summary: Investors are still turning to the judgment of a professional adviser in their last investment decision, despite using AI tools, a HSBC survey found.
items.title_zh: 即使手头有人工智能工具，投资者仍然寻求人性化：汇丰银行
items.summary_zh: 汇丰银行的一项调查发现，尽管使用了人工智能工具，投资者在做出最后的投资决策时仍然会参考专业顾问的判断。

items.title: Kalshi CEO says prediction market thinking about IPO, but not for this year
items.summary: Tarek Mansour said to CNBC's "Squawk Box" it made sense for the company at the stage to think about a debut on public markets.
items.title_zh: Kalshi首席执行官表示，预测市场正在考虑IPO，但今年不会
items.summary_zh: 塔里克·曼苏尔 (Tarek Mansour) 向 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”表示，公司现阶段考虑在公开市场上首次亮相是有意义的。

items.title: New meme stock Wendy's soars more than 25% with trading halted at one point
items.summary: While management changes can influence investor sentiment, the magnitude of the move suggests other forces may be at play.
items.title_zh: 新meme股票Wendy's飙升逾25%，一度停牌
items.summary_zh: 虽然管理层变动会影响投资者情绪，但变动幅度之大表明可能还有其他因素在起作用。

items.title: CFTC sues Kentucky over prediction markets enforcement actions; first 'red state' to face such  lawsuit
items.summary: The commission has now sued nine states in its battle to defend what it sees as its exclusive right to regulate event contracts.
items.title_zh: CFTC 就预测市场执法行动起诉肯塔基州；第一个面临此类诉讼的“红色州”
items.summary_zh: 该委员会现已起诉九个州，以捍卫其所认为的监管赛事合同的专有权利。

items.title: Mamdani-backed candidates are likely to win in NYC primaries, prediction market traders expect
items.summary: Voters are heading to the polls in New York, with four competitive races in Democratic congressional primaries in focus.
items.title_zh: 预测市场交易员预计，马姆达尼支持的候选人可能会在纽约市初选中获胜
items.summary_zh: 选民们即将前往纽约投票，民主党国会初选的四场激烈角逐成为焦点。

items.title: SpaceX seeing some interest from short sellers, but many still afraid to bet against Musk
items.summary: About 40 million SpaceX shares are sold short, roughly 5% to 7% of the shares that are publicly available to trade, according to an estimate by S3 Partners.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 看到了卖空者的一些兴趣，但许多人仍然不敢做空马斯克
items.summary_zh: 据 S3 Partners 估计，约有 4000 万股 SpaceX 股票被卖空，约占公开交易股票的 5% 至 7%。

items.title: Meta is building a prediction markets app. These stocks fell in response
items.summary: The report said that CEO Mark Zuckerberg directed staff to develop a prediction markets platform, internally known as "Arena."
items.title_zh: Meta 正在构建一个预测市场应用程序。这些股票应声下跌
items.summary_zh: 报道称，首席执行官马克·扎克伯格指示员工开发一个预测市场平台，内部称为“Arena”。

items.title: U.S. fights with Brazil for China's giant soybean market
items.summary: The U.S. Soybean Export Council makes claims to higher quality a selling point over Brazil's crop, as American farmers attempt to win back business from the world's largest importer
items.title_zh: 美国与巴西争夺中国巨大大豆市场
items.summary_zh: 美国大豆出口委员会声称更高质量是巴西作物的卖点，因为美国农民试图从世界最大进口国手中夺回业务

items.title: 'I thought building would fall on top of me' - Venezuelans describe earthquake panic
items.summary: Two quakes hit the capital seconds apart, the first at a magnitude of 7.2 and the second at 7.5.
items.title_zh: “我以为建筑物会倒在我身上”——委内瑞拉人描述地震恐慌
items.summary_zh: 两次地震相隔数秒发生，第一次震级为 7.2 级，第二次为 7.5 级。

items.title: France, UK and Spain see record temperatures as heatwave grips western Europe
items.summary: Tens of millions of people are grappling with punishing temperatures, which have led to red heat alerts across the continent.
items.title_zh: 热浪席卷西欧，法国、英国和西班牙气温创历史新高
items.summary_zh: 数以千万计的人们正在努力应对严酷的气温，这导致整个非洲大陆出现了高温警报。

items.title: Air conditioning creates political divide after France records hottest day
items.summary: France is being forced to re-think its longstanding reservations about air-conditioning as temperatures soar.
items.title_zh: 法国创下最热天气后空调引发政治分歧
items.summary_zh: 随着气温飙升，法国被迫重新考虑其长期以来对空调的保留态度。

items.title: Iran’s Loyalists Promote a Wider Nationalism, Unveiled Women Included
items.summary: Government supporters are showing off new ties with alleged former dissidents in a bid to show that they can withstand enemies at home as well as abroad.
items.title_zh: 伊朗的保皇派提倡更广泛的民族主义，其中包括不戴面纱的女性
items.summary_zh: 政府支持者正在炫耀与所谓的前持不同政见者的新关系，以表明他们能够抵御国内外的敌人。

items.title: See Record-Breaking Extreme Heat Wave Across Europe in Photos
items.summary: Temperature records were broken in several European countries on Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 在照片中查看欧洲破纪录的极端热浪
items.summary_zh: 周三，多个欧洲国家的气温记录被打破。

items.title: France Identifies Its First Case of Ebola
items.summary: A doctor who had traveled to the Democratic Republic of Congo was infected, the French health ministry said. The authorities said the risk to the wider population was low.
items.title_zh: 法国发现首例埃博拉病例
items.summary_zh: 法国卫生部表示，一名曾前往刚果民主共和国的医生被感染。当局表示，广大人群面临的风险较低。

items.title: ICC Judges Sue Trump Administration Over Sanctions
items.summary: Kimberly Prost, a Canadian judge at the International Criminal Court, and two colleagues are suing the administration, saying the sanctions were a form of retaliation.
items.title_zh: 国际刑事法院法官就制裁起诉特朗普政府
items.summary_zh: 国际刑事法院的加拿大法官金伯利·普罗斯特和两名同事正在起诉政府，称制裁是一种报复形式。

items.title: Extreme Heat Across Europe Creates Divide Over Leaving Schools Open
items.summary: Few schools in Britain or France have air-conditioning to keep children cool in soaring temperatures, leaving parents, teachers and officials divided about what to do.
items.title_zh: 欧洲各地的酷暑造成学校开放问题上的分歧
items.summary_zh: 英国或法国很少有学校配备空调来让孩子们在高温下保持凉爽，这让家长、老师和官员对于如何应对产生了分歧。

items.title: XRP slides 2.8% as weak bounce keeps $1 support in focus
items.summary: Sellers broke another support level on heavy volume, while the recovery failed to reclaim the zone that would ease downside pressure.
items.title_zh: XRP 下跌 2.8%，疲软反弹使 1 美元支撑成为焦点
items.summary_zh: 卖家在放量交易中突破了另一个支撑位，而复苏未能收回可以缓解下行压力的区域。

items.title: Kalshi targets a massive $40 billion valuation, widening lead over rival Polymarket
items.summary: The prediction market operator, which is eyeing a potential public debut in 2027, could close a new funding round in Q3, according to a Financial Times report.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 的目标估值高达 400 亿美元，扩大对竞争对手 Polymarket 的领先优势
items.summary_zh: 据《金融时报》报道，这家预测市场运营商计划在 2027 年首次公开亮相，可能会在第三季度完成新一轮融资。

items.title: Binance withdraws Greek MiCA bid but vows to remain in Europe
items.summary: The crypto giant must find a home base in the EU by July 1 or regulators will force the company to shut down operations for millions of regional users.
items.title_zh: 币安撤回希腊 MiCA 竞购但誓言留在欧洲
items.summary_zh: 这家加密巨头必须在 7 月 1 日之前在欧盟找到总部，否则监管机构将迫使该公司关闭数百万区域用户的业务。

items.title: CoinEx processed $3.8 billion in Iran-linked funds, acting as crypto gateway: TRM Labs
items.summary: CoinEx has also interacted with terrorist organizations, including the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, and sanctioned Russian entities.
items.title_zh: CoinEx 处理了 38 亿美元与伊朗相关的资金，充当加密网关：TRM Labs
items.summary_zh: CoinEx还与伊斯兰革命卫队等恐怖组织进行了互动，并制裁了俄罗斯实体。

items.title: Kalshi in talks to raise funds at $40 billion valuation: FT
items.summary: Kalshi's reported valuation reflects the firm's rapid growth, as it reported a $5 billion valuation last October.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 正在洽谈以 400 亿美元估值筹集资金：FT
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 公布的估值反映了该公司的快速增长，去年 10 月该公司公布的估值为 50 亿美元。

items.title: Pump.fun offers up to $5 million salary for chief legal officer role
items.summary: The position covers everything from SEC oversight to MiCA rules and U.K. regulations, and offers a salary between $1 million and $5 million.
items.title_zh: Pump.fun 为首席法律官职位提供高达 500 万美元的薪酬
items.summary_zh: 该职位涵盖从 SEC 监管到 MiCA 规则和英国法规的所有内容，薪资在 100 万至 500 万美元之间。

items.title: Superstate co-founder raises $3.6 million pre-seed for Ground to help fintechs access onchain yield
items.summary: Ground has raised $3.6 million in a pre-seed funding round co-led by Bain Capital Crypto and ParaFi as it emerges from stealth.
items.title_zh: Superstate 联合创始人为 Ground 筹集了 360 万美元预种子资金，以帮助金融科技公司获得链上收益
items.summary_zh: Ground 在由 Bain Capital Crypto 和 ParaFi 共同领投的种子前融资中筹集了 360 万美元，因为它已经悄然崛起。

items.title: a16z CSX-backed Cambrian raises $6 million seed to build blockchain data oracle network
items.summary: Cambrian, a startup building blockchain data infrastructure for institutions and AI agents, raised $6 million in a seed funding round.
items.title_zh: a16z CSX 支持的 Cambrian 筹集了 600 万美元种子资金，用于构建区块链数据预言机网络
items.summary_zh: Cambrian 是一家为机构和人工智能代理构建区块链数据基础设施的初创公司，在种子轮融资中筹集了 600 万美元。

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 LLM 优化的推理芯片
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 Jalapeo，这是一款专为 LLM 推理而构建的定制 AI 芯片，旨在提高 AI 系统的性能、效率和规模。

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.
items.title_zh: 帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 Appia 基金会帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准，支持评估框架、安全实践和全球合作。

items.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.
items.title_zh: Daybreak：保护世界上每个组织的工具
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了新的 Daybreak 工具，包括 Codex Security 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​，以帮助组织大规模查找、验证和修补漏洞。

items.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.
items.title_zh: 修补地球：支持开源维护者的黎明计划
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了 Patch the Planet，这是一项 Daybreak 计划，可帮助开源维护人员通过人工智能和专家评审来查找、验证和修复漏洞。

items.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
items.summary: Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.
items.title_zh: Codex-maxxing 适用于长时间运行的工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 Jason Liu 如何使用 Codex 保存上下文、管理复杂项目以及帮助工作在单一提示之外继续进行。

items.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
items.summary: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.
items.title_zh: 三星电子为员工带来 ChatGPT 和 Codex
items.summary_zh: 三星电子向全球员工部署 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex，这标志着 OpenAI 最大的企业人工智能部署之一。

items.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.
items.title_zh: 提高 ChatGPT 中的健康智能
items.summary_zh: 了解 GPT-5.5 Instant 如何通过更强的推理、更好的背景、更清晰的沟通和医生知情的评估来改善 ChatGPT 的健康和保健反应。

items.title: Introducing the FFASR Leaderboard: Benchmarking ASR in the Real World
items.title_zh: FFASR 排行榜简介：现实世界中的 ASR 基准测试

items.title: Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
items.title_zh: 使用 CUGA 构建真正的代理应用程序：轻量级工具上的两打工作示例

items.title: Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop
items.title_zh: 每周通过 AI、开放工具和人员参与交付 Huggingface_hub

items.title: Experimenting with the proposed Cross-Origin Storage API in Transformers.js
items.title_zh: 在 Transformers.js 中试验建议的跨域存储 API

items.title: PP-OCRv6 on Hugging Face: 50-Language OCR from 1.5M to 34.5M Parameters
items.title_zh: Hushing Face 上的 PP-OCRv6：从 1.5M 到 34.5M 参数的 50 种语言 OCR

items.title: Beyond LoRA: Can you beat the most popular fine-tuning technique?
items.title_zh: 超越LoRA：你能打败最流行的微调技术吗？

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: 我们正在通过新的投资和社区支持来加强我们在阿拉巴马州的业务。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布在 2026 年和 2027 年投资 15 亿美元，扩建其位于阿拉巴马州杰克逊县的数据中心园区。自 2019 年起在改造后的前…

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们在弗吉尼亚州的新社区投资支持当地就业并扩大能源负担能力。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: 5 ways Google Search can level up your thrift and vintage shopping
items.summary: Uncover second-hand scores with AI tools in Google Search and Shopping.
items.title_zh: Google 搜索提升您的旧货购物水平的 5 种方式
items.summary_zh: 使用 Google 搜索和购物中的 AI 工具发现二手乐谱。

items.title: How we used Gemini to build Google I/O 2026
items.summary: Learn how Googlers used AI to produce Google I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们如何使用 Gemini 构建 Google I/O 2026
items.summary_zh: 了解 Google 员工如何利用 AI 打造 Google I/O 2026。

items.summary: We used Google AI Studio to vibe code a quiz about our top I/O 2026 announcements.

items.summary_zh: 我们使用 Google AI Studio 编写了一个有关 I/O 2026 重要公告的测验。

items.summary: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: Gemini Omni 和 Gemini 3.5 的 9 个实际演示
items.summary_zh: 观看 9 个视频，展示 Google I/O 2026 上宣布的 Gemini Omni 和 Gemini 3.5 的功能。

items.title: Check out real-life AI prototypes from the Futures Lab.
items.summary: University of Waterloo students develop AI prototypes like sign language tutors to reshape the future of education and work.

items.summary_zh: 滑铁卢大学的学生开发了像手语导师这样的人工智能原型，以重塑教育和工作的未来。

items.title: Catch up on 12 major I/O 2026 moments
items.summary: Here are 12 of the biggest Google I/O 2026 keynote moments, including news about Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash and more.

items.summary_zh: 以下是 12 个最重要的 Google I/O 2026 主题演讲时刻，包括有关 Gemini Omni、Gemini 3.5 Flash 等的新闻。

items.title: Improving the speed and energy-efficiency of AI agents
items.summary: A new system, known as Murakkab, optimizes the design and deployment of multistep workflows that power AI applications.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能代理的速度和能源效率
items.summary_zh: 名为 Murakkab 的新系统优化了支持人工智能应用程序的多步骤工作流程的设计和部署。

items.title: MIT in the media: For the future of tech, "Massachusetts can absolutely lead"
items.summary: Leaders, faculty across MIT discuss fostering innovation and talent in Greater Boston in special series of articles published alongside the outlet's annual list of 'Tech Power Players'

items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的领导者和教师在与该媒体年度“科技强者”名单一起发表的特别系列文章中讨论了如何在大波士顿地区培养创新和人才

items.title: Could AI tell you where you left your keys?
items.summary: A new spatial memory system for robots efficiently captures details about the objects they see while exploring their environment.
items.title_zh: 人工智能可以告诉你你把钥匙放在哪里了吗？
items.summary_zh: 一种新的机器人空间记忆系统可以有效地捕捉它们在探索环境时看到的物体的细节。
